summary: Completed MVP testing for UltimateDesk CNC Pro. Backend APIs (19/19 tests passed). Frontend UI mostly working except Save Design feature has Mixed Content error due to infrastructure caching.

minor.issue: Fixed - endpoint was expecting nested params due to Optional[CNCConfig] parameter

ui_bugs.issue: Mixed Content error - browser making HTTP request instead of HTTPS to /api/designs/

integration_issues.issue: Save design fails with Mixed Content error. Backend API works via curl with HTTPS. Issue is infrastructure-level caching serving old JS bundle with HTTP URL.

issues: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning)

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Mixed Content error for Save Design - the frontend is making HTTP requests to /api/designs/ instead of HTTPS. This appears to be an infrastructure/CDN caching issue. The code has been updated to use window.location.origin but the old bundle is still being served.
Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: The getApiUrl() function was added to all files to ensure HTTPS protocol, but infrastructure caching is serving old bundles
Backend CNC endpoint was fixed - removed Optional[CNCConfig] parameter that was causing FastAPI to expect nested body
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Frontend has Mixed Content issue on Save Design - infrastructure caching is serving old JS bundle. May need to wait for cache to expire or force a production build.

features_tested.landing_page: PASS - Presets displayed, theme toggle works, navigation works
features_tested.user_registration: PASS - New users can register and are redirected to designer
features_tested.user_login: PASS - Admin login works with correct credentials
features_tested.ai_chat_designer: PASS - Sends messages, receives AI responses, updates params
features_tested.design_presets: PASS - 3 presets (gaming, studio, office) load correctly
features_tested.cnc_generation: PASS - Generates nesting, G-code preview, material estimates
features_tested.design_save: FAIL - Mixed Content error (HTTP instead of HTTPS)
features_tested.config_panel: PASS - Dimension sliders, feature toggles, style selectors work

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The frontend JavaScript bundle is being served from a CDN/proxy cache that contains an old version with HTTP URL instead of HTTPS. The code has been updated to use window.location.origin but the cached bundle is still being served.
reproduction_steps: 5. Browser console shows: Mixed Content error for http://nz-desk-creator.preview.emergentagent.com/api/designs/
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Wait for CDN cache to expire, or force a production build with cache busting. The backend API works correctly via curl with HTTPS.
